content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(3, 4, 0), (3, 7, 1), (0, 1, 5), (2, 5, 5), (6, 7, 5), (4, 9, 6), (4, 6, 7), (1, 2, 8), (1, 6, 9), (0, 4, 11), (1, 9, 11), (0, 9, 12), (4, 5, 12), (4, 7, 13), (2, 6, 15), (3, 6, 16), (5, 6, 18), (7, 8, 18)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 6 exactly at time 7.

First, we will scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

For time 7:

* Edge (3, 4, 0) has node 3 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (3, 7, 1) has node 3 and time 1. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (0, 1, 5) has node 0 and time 5. -> Add node 1.
* Edge (2, 5, 5) has node 2 and time 5. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (6, 7, 5) has node 6 and time 5. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (4, 9, 6) has node 4 and time 6. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (4, 6, 7) has node 4 and time 7. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (1, 2, 8) has node 1 and time 8. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (1, 6, 9) has node 1 and time 9. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (0, 4, 11) has node 0 and time 11. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (1, 9, 11) has node 1 and time 11. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 9, 12) has node 0 and time 12. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (4, 5, 12) has node 4 and time 12. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (4, 7, 13) has node 4 and time 13. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (2, 6, 15) has node 2 and time 15. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (3, 6, 16) has node 3 and time 16. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (5, 6, 18) has node 5 and time 18. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (7, 8, 18) has node 7 and time 18. -> Add node 8.

The nodes matched are 7, 6, and 8.

Answer: [7, 6, 8]
